subcodes.first_line: O bird of the morn of guidance! The time hath come for melody, music and song, and the hour is ripe for the strains of the harp and lute [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرغ صبح هدایت وقت نغمه و اهنک و ترانه است و هنگام آواز چنگ و بربط و چغانه
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
